items.currentUsage: Web-only Excel export actions in director proposal/request flows
items.rationale: Excel export is an optional branch and does not need to pull xlsx into the always-loaded director screen path.

items.currentUsage: Global web stylesheet injection for every route, regardless of whether a map is rendered
items.rationale: Leaflet CSS is only needed when the web map renderer mounts; keeping it out of the root layout reduces web-only bundle/runtime pollution.
Already isolated behind MapRenderer platform split; no additional safe tightening was needed in this wave.
Already isolated to native-only renderer via require-based platform split.
